creator: martymac@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Jason,

Thank you very much for your contribution.

I'd like to commit the attached patch, which is a slightly modified
version of your original patch. The most noticeable change is a better
PORTDOCS handling.

Do you agree with those changes ?

--
Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.org>
http://www.martymac.org | http://contribs.martymac.org
